description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style chaise with a carved wooden frame finished in a distressed, light beige tone. The backrest features a high, undulating crest with intricate floral carvings and deep button tufting, giving it a luxurious and classic appearance. The seat is upholstered in a patterned, pale fabric, complemented by a set of six loose cushions in various sizes and subtle geometric designs. Both armrests are gently curved and padded, matching the overall elegant silhouette of the piece. The legs are cabriole-shaped, with carved detailing that echoes the decorative motifs of the frame. This chaise exudes a sense of refined comfort and would be a striking addition to a sophisticated urban setting such as a park pavilion, upscale sidewalk, or boutique hotel lobby.
description: An ornate, vintage-style chaise with a carved wooden frame, tufted backrest, patterned upholstery, and six decorative cushions. The piece features elegant cabriole legs and a luxurious, classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's curved armrest, thick seat cushion, and the layered arrangement of cushions along the backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the ornate carved frame, button-tufted backrest, and the symmetrical arrangement of six cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with visible armrest curvature and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, upholstered back panel and the decorative crest at the top of the frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high and features a gently undulating crest with ornate floral carvings and deep button tufting. It is visually segmented by the tufting and has a plush, padded appearance, contributing to its classic, luxurious style.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, gently curved, padded, and integrated into the ornate wooden frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-shaped with carved detailing, made of wood, and finished in a distressed, light beige tone that matches the frame's decorative motifs.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is patterned with subtle geometric and damask motifs, and the backrest is tufted with buttons, adding texture and visual interest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are six loose cushions arranged symmetrically along the backrest, with a mix of larger and smaller sizes, all featuring matching or complementary patterns and colors.
